scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Max-Breadth: 60 Diversion: <sip:+4922829974328@sip.dhl.com>;reason=own;counter=1;privacy=off, <sip:+31402905555@sip.dhl.com>;reason="unknown" P-Charging-Vector: icid-value="dae81dc0-3a28-11eb-abb0-000c29e6632d" Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] P-Asserted-Identity: "+48504447978" <sip:+48504447978@sip.dhl.com;user=phone>, "+48504447979" <sip:+48504447978@sip.dhl.com;user=phone> Min-SE: 1800 Alert-Info: <cid:internal@sip.dhl.com>;avaya-cm-alert-type=internal User-Agent: AVAYA-SM-7.1.3.6.713604 Avaya CM/R017x.01.0.532.0 AVAYA-SM-7.1.3.6.713604 History-Info: <sip:+31402905555@sip.dhl.com>;index=1, "DECT, EIN" <sip:+31402905555@sip.dhl.com?Reason=SIP%3Bcause%3D302%3Btext%3D%22Moved%20Temporarily%22&Reason=Redirection%3Bcause%3DNORMAL%3Bavaya-cm-reason%3D%22cover-all%22>;index=1.1, <sip:+031883454345@sip.dhl.com>;index=2.1 P-AV-Message-Id: 3_1, 1_3 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 18 a=fmtp:18 annexb=yes

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
